ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the genomic target */,
  "exon" TEXT /* Exon of the genomic target */,
  "homology_arm_length" TEXT /* Length of the 5' and 3' homology arms */,
  "reporter_expression" REAL /* Percentage of reporter expression */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the genomic target */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the target is located */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Brief description of the gene's function */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the genomic target was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the genomic target was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the genomic target */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the genomic target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_targets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_targets_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_editing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic target */,
  "number_germline_transmitting_adults" INTEGER /* Number of germline transmitting adults */,
  "percentage_germline_transmitting_adults" REAL /* Percentage of germline transmitting adults */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for gene editing */,
  "reagent" TEXT /* Reagents used in the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the data */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_editing_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_editing_data_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES genomic_targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_editing_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_editing_data_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the researcher was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the researcher was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the researcher entry */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the researcher entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_upload_history" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being uploaded */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who uploaded the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the upload history was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the upload history was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the upload history */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the upload history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_upload_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_upload_history_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gene_editing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_upload_history_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_upload_history_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic target */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the experiment */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES genomic_targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_data" (
  "experiment_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being stored */,
  "data_point" REAL /* Actual data point value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data point */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the data point */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gene_editing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
